scripts.build: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm prisma:generate && corepack pnpm build:apps
scripts.test: corepack pnpm prisma:generate && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./packages/*" test && corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./apps/*" test
scripts.test:e2e: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @petwell/user-service test:e2e && corepack pnpm --filter @petwell/pet-service test:e2e && corepack pnpm --filter @petwell/appointment-service test:e2e && corepack pnpm --filter @petwell/ehr-service test:e2e && corepack pnpm --filter @petwell/billing-service test:e2e
scripts.validate:ops: docker compose config --quiet && node scripts/validate-assets.mjs && corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --lib ES2022,DOM scripts/e2e-critical.ts
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm prisma:generate && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./packages/*" lint && corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./apps/*" lint
scripts.prepare: node -e "console.log('Use corepack pnpm install to bootstrap the workspace.')"
